stories.title: Sources: Rodgers to sign 1-year deal with Steelers...
stories.summary: Four-time MVP Aaron Rodgers is expected to return the Steelers on a one-year deal worth up to $25 million, sources told ESPN on Saturday.

stories.title: McGregor books July 11 return against Holloway
stories.summary: Conor McGregor will make his much-anticipated return to the Octagon on July 11 against Max Holloway in a nontitle welterweight bout at UFC 329.

stories.title: 'Fantastic round' earns Rahm share of PGA lead
stories.summary: After rounds of 67 and 69 to open the PGA Championship at Aronimink Golf Club in Pennsylvania, Alex Smalley surged late on Saturday, registering a third-round 68 en route to a two-stroke edge over a crowded field of contenders that includes Jon Rahm.

stories.title: Ngannou blitzes Lins, stakes claim as 'best' HW
stories.summary: Former UFC champ Francis Ngannou made quick work of Philipe Lins on Saturday night, knocking him out in the first round before proclaiming himself the "best" heavyweight in the world.

stories.title: Facing elimination, Sabres start, pull Lyon again
stories.summary: Buffalo goaltender Alex Lyon started Game 6 against the Montreal Canadiens on Saturday night, with his Sabres facing elimination, but was pulled halfway into the first period after allowing three goals on three shots, giving way to Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen.
